title: Décor Vacuum Insulated Food Flask | 2-in-1 Hot & Cold Stainless Steel Food Container | 520ml - Black

Airtight seal - preserves the freshness of your food and prevent leaks
Easy to Clean - Featuring a wide mouth and a large 520ml capacity which makes filling, eating and cleaning easy
Reusable & Durable - Décor have been making lives easier for over 60 years with homewares that are functional, affordable and made to last
